prompt: A modern and cozy living room. A family of four consisting of a father, mother, sister, and brother are watching a soccer match on a large TV. Instead of sitting on the sofa, the whole family is cheering while dancing the samba with smiles, matching the excitement of the match. Dynamic poses include raising hands high, stepping to the rhythm, and shouting for joy. Everyone has a big smile and is genuinely enjoying the game. Everyone is wearing gorgeous samba costumes reminiscent of an authentic Brazilian carnival. Luxurious costumes sparkling with sequins, large beautiful feather decorations, glittering accessories, and vibrant tropical colors like yellow, green, blue, and red. The costumes are elegant and family-oriented. Feathers and fringes sway greatly with the momentum of the dance, and sequins reflect the light. The TV shows an intense soccer match, and its light illuminates the family's faces. Confetti flies in the living room, drinks and snacks are on the coffee table, and soccer balls, cheering goods, small national flags, and scarves are decorated, creating an atmosphere of excitement as if watching a championship game together. The whole family is captured at the peak moment of the dance, with natural motion blur on limbs and feather decorations, emphasizing a sense of dynamism and presence. A shot that simultaneously conveys the atmosphere of a warm and happy home and the excitement of watching sports. Photorealistic, ultra-high-definition, cinematic composition like a scene from a movie, natural indoor lighting and TV light, realistic skin texture, precise fabric expression, detailed feather depiction, HDR, 8K, high-quality photography, shallow depth of field, dynamic composition, documentary photography style, the decisive moment, realism, overwhelming reality, highest quality.
